message:
fix: correct session transcript message count (19 human turns, not 577)

cass export-html reported 577 "messages" which includes tool calls, tool
results, system injections, and progress events. The actual conversation
had 19 human-typed prompts and ~400 tool calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
